cs.name: CS Research
cs.description: Computer Science — AI, Machine Learning, NLP, Computer Vision
cs.arxiv_query: cat:cs.AI OR cat:cs.LG OR cat:cs.CL OR cat:cs.CV OR cat:cs.SE

biology.name: Biology Research
biology.arxiv_query: cat:q-bio.GN OR cat:q-bio.BM OR cat:q-bio.NC OR cat:q-bio.PE OR cat:q-bio.MN

electrochem.name: Electrochem Research
electrochem.description: Electrochemistry — Materials Science, Chemical Physics, Applied Physics

physics.name: Physics Research
physics.description: Physics — Quantum Physics, High Energy Theory, General Relativity
physics.arxiv_query: cat:quant-ph OR cat:hep-th OR cat:gr-qc OR cat:physics.gen-ph

_labs_example._comment: To pull papers from specific labs or authors, add entries to the 'labs' array for any category. Papers matching these authors will be prioritized at the top of the list.
